allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path 'C:\\m'\) { "C:\\m already exists: $\(\(Get-Item 'C:\\m'\).LinkType\) -> $\(\(Get-Item 'C:\\m'\).Target\)" } else { New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path 'C:\\m' -Target 'C:\\Users\\Saviour ICT-CRC\\Desktop\\Personal Project\\Personal Projects2\\korean-learning-app\\mobile' | Out-Null; "Created junction C:\\m" }; if \(Test-Path 'C:\\m\\android\\app\\build'\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'C:\\m\\android\\app\\build'; "cleaned app/build" }; if \(Test-Path 'C:\\m\\android\\.gradle'\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'C:\\m\\android\\.gradle'; "cleaned .gradle" }; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\m\\node_modules' -Filter '.cxx' -Recurse -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $_.FullName; "cleaned $\($_.FullName\)" })
